hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select ptpm.* from PSP_PMT_TEMPLATE_PAYMENTMETHOD ptpm join PSP_PAYMENT_METHOD_REQUIREMENT pmr on PTPM.PMT_TEMPLATE_PAYMENTMETHOD_SEQ= pmr.pmt_template_pmt_method_fk join PSP_MANUAL_REQUIREMENT mr on MR.MANUAL_REQUIREMENT_SEQ=PMR.PAYMENT_METHOD_REQUIREMENT_SEQ and payment_template_fk=:paymentTemplateCd
